title: Chrono Trigger - Robo's Theme on Mario Paint Composer
description:
I just couldn't resist doing this song. It was one of the catchiest in the game. Mario Paint Composer's wacky instruments and the diversity of the song itself results in this song being able to be done in many ways (a good use for the pig ^.^). I went for the apporach of "as accurate as possible that still sounds good." 

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: Camstudio 2.0 - http://camstudio.org/

Editing: Windows Movie Maker

All free, legal, and unlimited.
